video_subject: A squad of elite Indian soldiers in modern tactical gear advancing through a destroyed urban battlefield. Smoke and embers fill the air between ruined concrete structures.
motion_dynamics: Tactical movement 'slice the pie' around corners; helicopters flying low overhead with rapid blade blur; sparks and debris falling from burning vehicles; high-tension kinetic motion.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Soldiers move through a thick cloud of smoke, weapons raised, with a burning humvee in the background.
4s: A helicopter roars overhead, kicking up dust as the lead soldier signals the squad to halt.
8s: The camera follows the soldiers as they breach a ruined building, sparks raining from a flickering wire.
visual_style: Modern War Film. Camera: Cinema Digital 35mm, Lens: Anamorphic, Focal Length: 35mm, Aperture: f/4. Fine grain film stock, Desaturated trenches movie look. Intense cinematic realism.
negative_prompt: shaky camera (unstable), low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, saturation, beautiful flowers, clean streets.
